creator: roman@xpert.com
text:
The whisker port cannot find its database files unless you're standing in
/usr/local/lib/whisker.

Also, platform independent files are installed in lib rather than share.

Fix: I fixed the path problem and moved the whisker files to share.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/security/whisker; make install; rehash; whisker -h localhost
